title: 吗有他冒险周
summary: 本周重点复习 吗、有、他。故事会围绕 好吗、是吗、有吗 展开。

story.title: 早晨出发
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 你好吗？. Include focus characters 吗, 有, 他 and words 好吗, 是吗.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 你好吗？. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 早晨出发：先展示 你好吗？，再慢慢突出汉字 吗、有、他，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。

story.title: 课堂发现
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 我有一本书。. Include focus characters 有, 他 and words 是吗, 有吗.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 我有一本书。. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 课堂发现：先展示 我有一本书。，再慢慢突出汉字 有、他，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。

story.title: 开心收尾
story.image_prompt: Create a storybook illustration, soft shapes, warm light, expressive characters scene for children. Scene: 他很好。. Include focus characters 他 and words 有吗, 没有.
story.video_prompt: Create a 8-second short clip, gentle camera move, kid-safe, colorful classroom adventure clip. Scene: 他很好。. Keep the motion simple, cheerful, and easy for children to follow.
story.video_script: 开心收尾：先展示 他很好。，再慢慢突出汉字 他，最后用一句温柔的鼓励收尾。
